overall.description: A first-person perspective from a hillside overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis during a severe fog storm at night. The camera slowly pans across barren terrain revealing neon-lit skyscrapers partially obscured by dense atmospheric haze, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside overlook of cyberpunk city during severe fog storm

agents.ego_description: standing on a hillside overlooking the fog-obscured cityscape, slowly scanning the neon-lit skyline

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers with scattered illuminated windows visible through heavy fog
multiple rectangular red neon signs floating above the city haze
tall dark building outlines with vertical lighting strips
barren rocky slope in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stationary view from a hillside overlooking Night City during a severe fog storm. The skyline is barely visible through the dense teal-colored haze, with red neon billboards providing the primary light sources. The foreground shows barren rocky terrain sloping downward toward the metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: barren hillside terrain away from city view

events.description: camera begins panning left away from the city skyline toward the hillside terrain

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the barren hillside, moving the city view out of frame

entered.detail: steep rocky incline extending into the foggy distance
dark jagged rocks in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the barren hillside terrain, leaving the city skyline behind. The view transitions to focus on the desolate rocky slope and foggy atmosphere, with only a faint glow from the distant city remaining visible on the right edge before disappearing completely.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning view to cyberpunk city skyline

events.description: camera pans back right to re-center on the city skyline

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the city to resume observing the skyline through the fog

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers with scattered illuminated windows visible through heavy fog
multiple rectangular red neon signs floating above the city haze

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its pan by turning back right toward the city, bringing the neon skyline back into view. The red billboards and skyscraper silhouettes re-emerge from the fog as the hillside terrain shifts to the left side of the frame, restoring the initial overlook perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a desolate hillside that momentarily obscures a neon-lit metropolis before returning to the city view. It begins with a stationary overlook of Night City, where red neon billboards pierce through a dense, teal-colored fog over a barren rocky slope. As the camera pans left, the skyline gradually recedes and vanishes, shifting the focus entirely to the desolate terrain and the thick atmospheric haze. The scene then turns back toward the right, allowing the skyscraper silhouettes and glowing red lights to re-emerge from the mist. Finally, the movement settles as the hillside shifts to the left, restoring the initial perspective of the sprawling city beneath the storm.
